sys_atf_test.description: Tests that requesters are only capable to read the loan records where the "requested_for" field correspond to them.
sys_atf_test.name: Requester cannot read OWN loans

sys_update_version.name: sys_atf_test_fc693c2d839003105587fa96feaad34b
